decisions.note: Three different lakes: Aboyinzu Chaal Nazzerox, Upoceax Sandreach, Upoceax Wycendeula/Kilbyurn.
Eoga Drift (3024 stub + 3048 detail) merged. Sheîr/Bledreon Drift (4316) is unrelated.
Different island groups: Floating Islands, Sea of Sharks, Xibli.
Eberri Ygonzi Nox (3948 stub + 4046 detail) merged. Zelidian Nox (4452) is a different village.
All three describe Crab Island pirate haven.
"The Sound" subsections under different unrelated places (Melodia, Mumbling Forest, Bellowing Mountains, Screech).
Two forests: Edari Howlwood (Ve.md, ids 134/193) and Iylovia Howlwood (Clueanda.md, ids 606/618).
Catalina/Tornia Besnoumeru (400 + stub 828) is distinct from Nektuna Besnoumeru (2561).
All three describe the Walking Forest city-state on Springs of Vyowehr.
Postronamas ruins (1117/1135) merged. 3848 in Upoceax is unrelated giant artifact.
